rules.clinical_effect: Increased risk of torsades de pointes.
rules.recommended_action: Avoid if possible; if unavoidable, intensive ECG/electrolyte monitoring.
rules.dose_adjustment_hint: No direct equation; prioritize alternative regimen.

rules.clinical_effect: Higher risk of oversedation and hypoventilation.
rules.recommended_action: Start lower doses and monitor respiratory status closely.
rules.dose_adjustment_hint: Use lower initial sedative/opioid rates and titrate slowly.
